name: Joushuu Higashikata
description: Joshu is the spoiled third of Norisuke Higashikata IV's four children and eventually rubs shoulders with Josuke Higashikata without truly becoming a friend. He has an unrequited crush on Yasuho Hirose. Joshu eventually awakens a Stand, Nut King Call.

name: Jujousaibou
description: The role of Dendritic Cells is to present bacteria that have invaded the body, and fragments of viral infected cells as antigens an to notify other immune cells. As their name implies, they feature protrusions. Dendritic Cells can activate Naive T-Cells. (Source: Cells at Work Wiki)

name: Kahaku
description: Kahaku is the sixth successor of the Defense Corps and the first male successor of Hayase's will.

name: Koyume Koizuka
description: A shoujo manga artist who struggles with drawing boys. She develops a crush on Tsubasa. She has no experience in romance, so she is always nervous about the quality of her romantic manga and the nature of her "strange" feelings for Tsubasa as another girl.

name: Lettuce Midorikawa
description: **Height:** 162 cm (5'4") She is the third member of Tokyo Mew Mew to be introduced and her DNA is merged with a Fin-less Porpoise. She is a shy, second-year junior high student who attends Okumura Junior High (Excalibur High School in the English anime adaptation) and works at Café Mew Mew. name: Ludger Cherish
description: A fake professor at Ceoren Academy.

name: Melusine
description: She’s a member of Faerie Britain's Knights of the Round Table. She is a Fairy Knight assuming the name of the Heroic Spirit [Lancelot](https://anilist.co/character/12732), who belongs to the Greater Human History's Knights of the Round Table. The sole "dragon" species fairy in Britain. She acts in the manner of a merciless knight, but because of that conduct, her elegance and her appearance that distinguishes her from other fairies, she is said to be the proudest and most beautiful of them all.

name: Mitsuki Ooshiro
description: [Aharen](https://anilist.co/character/121703/Reina-Aharen)'s friend since middle school. She is very shy, constantly watching over Aharen-san from a distance, very good at hiding. She's also very good at martial arts.

name: Myoue
description: A monk who takes care of Koto and her siblings, the twins. He has a secret lover, and a dog called Inuyama-san.

name: Persephone
description: Persephone, better known by her constellation modifier "Queen of the Darkest Spring," is the wife of Hades and queen of the Underworld. She is equal in power to Hades and can change her incarnation appearance at will.

name: Rakushun
description: Rakushun is a hanjyuu with the form of a rat. Though Youko is initially distrustful of him, he becomes her first good friend after she is taken from Japan, after managing to teach some essential skills to Yoko about life. He is very intelligent and knowledgeable and enrolled in the Daigaku of En. name: Satsuki Shinonome
description: Satsuki is Yuuki's main opponent during the student council elections. She is Hazuki Shinonome's little sister. Satsuki is a kind and gentle girl who also loves Yuuki's famous "Oojima Roll", but denies this. She also calls Yuuki "Pekojima-kun".

name: Sougen
description: **Occupation:** Spy **Affiliation:** Lamplight **Skills:** She has a talent for rearing and training animals, using her skills to train pet animals to perform tasks and assist her in various missions. Sara is one of the main protagonists in the Spy Classroom series. She is a timid but kind-hearted girl who tends to add "ssu" at the end of her words. She is the daughter of a chef and restaurant owner in a rural town.

name: Takeru Fujiwara
description: He usually wears glasses, but during practice he uses contacts. He is a first-year student at Honan Academy and is one of the stride club's runners, and predominantly an anchor (final runner). Takeru is always cool and stoic with sober eyes. He has little interest in things other than playing Stride. In middle school, Takeru was a famous Stride player in the under 15's category. He tends to feel people's legs to determine one's talent. name: Tako
description: Tako is the pet cat of Makimura family. ~!It later transforms into "devilcat" and becomes Akira Fudo's aide. During final battle against Satan, he attempts to attack the angel directly, but getting killed again, this time by Satan's telepathic slash.!~
